title: TOS student profile (roster) — PII/ePHI
description: A student profile keyed by the school student_id, with guardians (to contact home) and health_plans (ePHI — e.g. an anaphylaxis action plan stating when/where to administer epinephrine). REPO RULE: any tracked/committed file using this schema MUST use placeholders only; real data lives only in the gitignored local store or a live SIS. Policy + precedence/conflict rules: student-data-policy.md.

is_placeholder.description: true for the committed example; real stores set false

health_plans.description: ePHI — safety-critical. Surface verbatim from the SOURCE on file (any trusted source — district/school health form, nurse note, guardian note, sick note, or signed action plan; a physician signature is OPTIONAL, not required), attributed with its source + authority + date; never fabricate; defer to the nurse / 911 in an emergency.

instructions.description: what to do — verbatim from the source

source_type.description: where the guidance comes from; no source is privileged by signature alone

source_authority.description: official form / action plan = high; nurse or guardian note = medium; verbal / unverified = low

provided_by.description: who provided it (e.g. school nurse, guardian, physician)

signed.description: OPTIONAL — a signature is not required to trust the source

provenance.description: where this record came from (sis | local | teacher-entered)
